violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
Pepper in walk in cooler observed with mold. PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

( Fried chicken) was observed held at (120) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
Buckets of raw chicken was observed being store in non food grade buckets. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep tables shelves and prep cooler(interior) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The floors (areas in the kitchen and steam tables) are constructed of (unsealed cement) which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025
